name: IMA Nano Banana Image Generator
tagline: Nano Banana-only image generation on IMA: text_to_image + image_to_image.
description: Generate images via IMA Open API using Nano Banana models only (gemini-3.1-flash-image, gemini-3-pro-image). Supports text_to_image and image_to_image through scripts/ima_image_create.py, with deterministic size/ratio mapping and budget vs premium profiles. Requires IMA_API_KEY.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent to api.imastudio.com (generation) and, for image_to_image with local files, to imapi.liveme.com (upload). Both are IMA Studio. Obtain keys at https://www.imaclaw.ai/. Use a scoped/test key for initial testing.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime. It is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local image uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Nano Banana model-only generation: text_to_image and image_to_image
Budget / balanced / premium profile selection with size controls
Aspect ratio control: 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4 (8K requests downgraded to 4K)
key_features: Strict Nano Banana model allowlist in script runtime
Deterministic task/model/size/ratio mapping for weak-model safety
Local file uploads use IMA's shared upload-signing credentials (same as ima-image-ai)
Upload-token request uses POST body with redacted error logging
Fixed API domain policy (no runtime endpoint override)
No SeeDream/Midjourney or other non-Nano-Banana model paths
